name: Kanban MCP
what_it_does: Local Kanban board MCP server enabling AI agents to manage kanban-style task boards — creating and moving cards between columns (To Do, In Progress, Done), managing boards and lists, tracking task progress, and integrating kanban workflow management into agent-driven project coordination. Provides lightweight local kanban without requiring external services.
use_cases: Managing personal project tasks on a local kanban board from productivity agents
Moving tasks between workflow stages from project coordination agents
Creating task cards and tracking progress from work management agents
Organizing work items by status without external service dependency from self-sufficient agents
Implementing simple project workflows for AI-assisted projects from automation agents
not_for: Team collaboration requiring shared kanban boards (this is local/personal)
Enterprise project management with advanced features (use Jira, Linear, or Trello MCPs)
Complex agile ceremonies requiring sprint planning, velocity tracking, etc.
best_when: A solo developer or AI agent needs simple local kanban-style task tracking without cloud dependencies — lightweight personal project management within agent workflows.
avoid_when: You need team collaboration, cloud sync, or advanced project management features — use Jira, Linear, Trello, or Notion MCPs for those.

auth.notes: No authentication required — local kanban storage. Data stored locally in files or SQLite. No external services needed.

pricing.notes: Free local kanban MCP. No external dependencies.

known_agent_gotchas: Local storage only — no cloud sync; data exists only on the host machine
Data persistence depends on local file system — back up board data if important
Board state is simple — limited to basic kanban columns without complex workflow rules
Community MCP — limited documentation; test basic operations before relying on in workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local only. No credentials. Board data stored locally. No external network calls. Minimal attack surface.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local only. No credentials. Local file storage. No network. Minimal security concerns.
